tools.name: .env Parser & Validator
tools.shortDescription: Parse, validate, mask, search, and export .env files entirely in the browser.
tools.longDescription:
## .env Parser & Validator

A privacy-first developer utility for inspecting .env configuration files locally without uploads, servers, or dependencies.

### Features

- Paste, upload, or drag and drop .env files
- Parses comments, blank lines, quoted values, escaped characters, empty values, and spaces around equals signs
- Detects duplicate keys, malformed lines, invalid names, whitespace issues, empty values, invalid quotes, unused comments, and suspicious values
- Masks sensitive variables such as API keys, secrets, passwords, tokens, private keys, and database URLs by default
- Live search, filtering, sorting, pagination, and validation statistics
- Exports pretty or minified JSON and cleaned .env files with duplicate and comment options
- Keyboard shortcuts for opening, clearing, searching, and downloading
- Works completely offline in a single browser-only HTML file

tools.name: .env Parser & Validator (Strict Mode)
tools.shortDescription: Parse .env files under strict rules, with detailed line-by-line validation, quick-fix suggestions, and metrics.
tools.longDescription:
## .env Parser & Validator (Strict Mode)

A highly precise developer utility for strict validation of .env configuration files. Detects syntax anomalies, invalid characters, unclosed quotes, duplicate definitions, and style issues, complete with actionable inline fixes.

### Features

- Strict key validation: enforces alphanumeric character sets and correct start characters
- Line-by-line visual analyzer showing green, yellow (warning), and red (error) status
- Actionable 'Quick Fix' options to automatically correct spaces, quote wrapping, keys, and duplicate definitions
- Dashboard displaying summary metrics (valid, empty, duplicate, warning, and error keys)
- Normalization/Sanitization export options: trim spaces, enforce uppercase keys, strip/keep inline comments, normalize quotes
- Fast local processing: all parses happen in-browser offline with zero server uploads

tools.name: A11y Contrast Grid Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate a comprehensive accessibility matrix comparing all background and foreground color combinations against WCAG 2.1 contrast guidelines.
tools.longDescription:
## A11y Contrast Grid Generator

An interactive utility to evaluate a color palette's accessibility by generating a comprehensive grid comparing all background/foreground color combinations against WCAG 2.1 contrast guidelines.

### Features

- **Interactive Palette Manager**: Add, edit, or delete custom colors (HEX, RGB, HSL) with real-time swatch previews.
- **Accessibility Compliance Matrix**: Generates a matrix comparing every color as background against every color as foreground, displaying contrast ratios and WCAG status (AA, AAA, or Fail) for normal and large text.
- **Intelligent Filtering**: Filter the grid to show only compliant combinations, only AA-compliant, or only AAA-compliant pairs.
- **Design Tokens Export**: Export color combinations as Tailwind configurations, CSS custom properties, SCSS variables, or JSON.
- **Export Capabilities**: Export the final contrast grid as an SVG, CSV, or formatted HTML snippet.

tools.longDescription:
## Advanced Robots.txt Generator

Generate a valid robots.txt file through an intuitive visual interface. Configure multiple user-agent groups, Allow/Disallow directives, Crawl-delay values, optional Host directives, and XML Sitemaps while seeing the generated robots.txt update instantly.

### Features

- Visual editor for robots.txt generation
- Support for multiple User-agent groups
- Add Allow and Disallow rules with one click
- Optional Crawl-delay directive for each user-agent
- Optional Host directive support
- Add multiple XML Sitemap URLs
- Built-in presets including Allow All, Disallow All, Standard SEO, and WordPress Base
- Live syntax-highlighted robots.txt preview
- Copy generated robots.txt to the clipboard
- Download the generated file as robots.txt
- Fully responsive interface with modern dark theme
- Built with HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript with no backend required

tools.name: Alt Text Helper

## Alt Text Helper

- **Instant Export:** Auto-generates standard-compliant `cubic-bezier()` CSS syntax with a 1-click copy feature.
- **Offline First:** Operates entirely client-side using Vanilla JS and native SVG manipulation.

tools.name: Bash Sandbox
tools.shortDescription: A simulated bash terminal to play with and learn common commands, entirely in your browser.
tools.longDescription:
## Bash Sandbox

A simulated bash terminal environment that runs entirely in your browser. It's a safe and fun way to learn and experiment with common shell commands like `ls`, `cd`, `cat`, `mkdir`, and `echo` without any risk to your system. The sandbox operates on a virtual file system that resets on every page load.

### Features

- A realistic terminal-like interface.
- Support for core commands: `ls`, `cd`, `cat`, `mkdir`, `touch`, `pwd`, `echo`, `clear`, and `help`.
- A virtual file system to navigate and manipulate.
- Command history using up/down arrow keys.
- Tab autocompletion for paths.
- Works entirely offline.

tools.name: Case Converter

tools.longDescription:
## Case Converter

A tool that transforms input text between different case and casing conventions. Useful for developers who need to quickly reformat variable names, headings, or copy between styles (e.g. converting a sentence into camelCase for a JS variable, or into CONSTANT_CASE for an env var), as well as writers who want quick title-casing or sentence-casing for headings and copy.

### Features
- Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, and Sentence case
- Convert to programming case styles: camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE
- Fun/novelty conversions: aLtErNaTiNg CaSe and iNVERSE CaSe
- Live character and word count for the input
- One-click "Copy result" button with confirmation feedback
- Smart word-splitting that correctly re-splits existing camelCase/snake_case/kebab-case input before converting to a new format
- Fully keyboard accessible, dark mode support

## Code Snippet Manager

A personal, offline code snippet manager that allows developers to store, categorize, and quickly retrieve frequently used code blocks. It features syntax highlighting for various programming languages, a search function, and one-click copy-to-clipboard functionality. All snippets are stored locally in the browser's `localStorage`.

### Features

- Add, edit, and delete code snippets.
- Assign a language (e.g., JavaScript, Python, CSS) to each snippet.
- Syntax highlighting via a lightweight CDN library (Highlight.js).
- Search and filter snippets by name, language, or tags.
- One-click copy to clipboard.
- Persist snippets in `localStorage`.
- Import/Export snippets as a JSON file.

tools.name: Container Query Sandbox
tools.shortDescription: A visual builder and live tester for CSS Container Queries (@container) that react to parent dimensions rather than the viewport.
tools.longDescription:
## Container Query Sandbox

Responsive design is moving beyond the browser window. Container Queries allow components to adapt based on their parent container's size, but testing them can be tedious. This sandbox provides a visual environment to define named containers, set breakpoint rules, and resize the parent element in real-time to watch your component reflow.

### Features

- **Live Container Resizing:** Drag-resizable demo stages (width and height) to test responsive behavior without browser window manipulation.
- **Real CSS Application:** Generates and injects actual `@container` CSS, ensuring 100% browser-accurate rendering.
- **Visual Rule Builder:** Add or remove breakpoints (`min-width`/`max-width`) and edit associated CSS declarations via an intuitive UI.
- **Active Breakpoint Badges:** Real-time feedback indicators that highlight which query is currently firing.
- **CQ Units Demo:** Includes a sample element using container query length units (`cqw`, `cqi`) to demonstrate context-aware scaling.
- **Zero-Dependency Engine:** High-performance, responsive layout tool built entirely in a single HTML file using Vanilla JS and CSS.

tools.name: Content-Visibility & Intersection Debugger
tools.shortDescription: A performance debugging tool that visualizes content-visibility: auto states to help developers track layout and paint skipping.
tools.longDescription:
## Content-Visibility & Intersection Debugger

Modern browser optimizations like `content-visibility: auto` are powerful but often invisible. This debugger renders a long, complex page and overlays live status indicators for every section. It uses the `contentvisibilityautostatechange` event to show exactly when off-screen sections are skipped from layout and paint cycles.

### Features

- **Live Rendering Monitor:** Real-time visual overlays show whether sections are currently rendered or skipped.
- **Event Visualization:** Tracks `contentvisibilityautostatechange` events to log the exact moment the browser optimizes rendering.
- **Performance Insight:** Helps developers understand the impact of CSS containment on browser performance and Web Vitals.
- **Interactive Demo:** Manipulate a tall, heavy DOM structure to stress-test browser optimization.
- **Zero-Dependency Engine:** High-performance, responsive performance visualization tool built entirely in a single HTML file using Vanilla JS and CSS.

tools.name: CSS Custom Property Fallback Chain Debugger
tools.shortDescription: A visual analyzer for deeply nested CSS var() fallback chains that tracks down evaluation paths and silent invalid-value bugs.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Custom Property Fallback Chain Debugger

Deeply nested CSS custom property chains like `var(--a, var(--b, var(--c, red)))` can become black boxes when troubleshooting layouts. This debugger isolates your custom property chains and visualizes their resolution logic cell-by-cell. It exposes complex browser behaviors, such as when a variable is defined but carries a value invalid for its context, causing the browser to silently fall through to the next declaration.

### Features

- **Visual Chain Mapping:** Paste any CSS rule containing nested custom properties to see an instant, hierarchical tree of its fallback execution path.

tools.longDescription:
## HTTP Cache-Control Simulator

HTTP caching rules can feel abstract and difficult to debug in a live production environment. This simulator provides a visual sandbox where you can configure custom response headers and observe exactly how a browser evaluates cache freshness across various navigation actions.

### Features

- **Header Configuration Sandbox:** Tweak `Cache-Control` directives (`max-age`, `no-cache`, `no-store`, `must-revalidate`) and set custom validators like `ETag` and `Last-Modified` tokens.
- **Navigation Action Triggers:** Simulate explicit user behaviors including fresh page loads, standard reloads, hard refetches, and back/forward browser navigation.
- **Visual Pipeline Execution:** Real-time feedback showing whether a request results in a network fetch (200 OK), a server revalidation (304 Not Modified), or a local memory/disk cache hit.
- **Request/Response Inspection:** Watch the client dynamically construct conditional request headers like `If-None-Match` and `If-Modified-Since` based on the current cache state.
- **Zero-Dependency Architecture:** A completely self-contained responsive dashboard running entirely in the browser using Vanilla JS and native CSS layout structures.

- Duplicate resolver: merges multi-value headers with comma separator, and overrides single-value headers
- Format validations for Authorization (Basic/Bearer/Token), Content-Type (MIME type check), Connection, Cache-Control, Cookie, and Host

## Tailwind to Vanilla CSS Converter

Convert Tailwind CSS utility classes into their equivalent vanilla CSS properties for learning or migration.

### Features

- Paste Tailwind classes to get vanilla CSS output.
- Supports common utility classes.
- Instant conversion with live preview.
- Copy output to clipboard.
- Single HTML file, works offline.
- Responsive design with dark mode support.

tools.name: Target Grade Forecaster
tools.shortDescription: Calculate your current average and find out exactly what you need on the final.
tools.longDescription:
## Target Grade & GPA Forecaster

Calculate your current average and find out exactly what you need on the final exam to achieve your target grade.

tools.name: Text Diff Viewer
tools.shortDescription: Compare two blocks of text and see line-level and word-level differences, side-by-side or unified.
tools.longDescription:
## Text Diff Viewer

Compare two blocks of plain text and instantly see what changed, with both unified and side-by-side split views.

### Features

- Line-level diff highlighting (added / removed / modified)
- Word-level highlighting within modified lines for precise change detection
- Toggle between Unified and Split view modes
- Hide unchanged lines to focus on differences
- Copy diff output in plain-text unified format
- Light and dark mode support
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Timestamp Converter
tools.shortDescription: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and back, with local time, UTC, and relative time.
tools.longDescription:
## Timestamp Converter

Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates, or dates back to Unix time, in either direction. Useful for developers, testers, and analysts working with logs, APIs, and scheduling systems.

### Features

- Convert Unix timestamps (seconds or milliseconds) to readable dates
- Convert a date/time back to a Unix timestamp
- Results shown in local time, UTC, ISO 8601, and relative ("3 hours ago") form
- Live conversion as you type
- One-click "Use current time" button
- Per-value copy to clipboard
- Clear/reset with a single click
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: Twitter / X Card Preview
tools.shortDescription: Preview how Twitter/X cards appear with live updates for Summary and Summary Large Image layouts.
tools.longDescription:
## Twitter / X Card Preview

Preview how your content may appear when shared on Twitter/X. Enter a title, description, image URL, website URL, and choose between Summary or Summary Large Image card layouts to see a live preview.

### Features

- Live Twitter/X card preview
- Supports Summary and Summary Large Image card types
- Real-time preview updates
- Website domain extraction from URL
- Reset form functionality
- Responsive and mobile-friendly design
- Fully offline and self-contained

tools.name: Unicode Inspector
tools.shortDescription: Inspect every character's Unicode code point, UTF-8/UTF-16 bytes, category, and escape sequences.
tools.longDescription:
## Unicode Inspector

Inspect Unicode characters in real time as you type or paste text. See each character's code point, best-effort name or category, UTF-8/UTF-16 byte representation, HTML entity, and JavaScript escape sequence — with invisible and whitespace characters flagged.

### Features

- Real-time character-by-character inspection
- Unicode code point (e.g. U+1F600)
- Character name where available, else Unicode category via native \p{} property detection
- UTF-8 and UTF-16 byte/code-unit representations
- HTML entity and JavaScript Unicode escape sequences
- Highlights invisible/whitespace characters (tabs, newlines, NBSP, zero-width spaces, BOM, etc.)
- Total character and UTF-16 code unit counts
- One-click copy of any code point
- Clear/reset with a single click
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: URL Encoder / Decoder
tools.shortDescription: Encode and decode URLs or percent-encoded strings instantly using native browser APIs.
tools.longDescription:
## URL Encoder / Decoder

A fast, offline utility for encoding and decoding URLs, query parameters, and percent-encoded strings using native JavaScript APIs.

### Features
- Encode complete URLs using encodeURI()
- Encode query parameters using encodeURIComponent()
- Decode percent-encoded strings using decodeURIComponent()
- Real-time conversion as you type
- Detects invalid or malformed percent-encoded strings
- Character counters for input and output
- Copy output to clipboard
- Swap input and output
- Load built-in examples
- Fully responsive design with dark mode support
- Works completely offline with no external dependencies

tools.name: User Agent Parser
tools.shortDescription: Parse any User-Agent string into a readable breakdown of browser, engine, OS, device, and CPU architecture.
tools.longDescription:
## User Agent Parser

Parse any User-Agent string — or your current browser — into a plain, readable breakdown. Identifies the browser and version, rendering engine, operating system and version, device type, and CPU architecture when available. All parsing happens entirely offline.

### Features

- Paste and parse any User-Agent string instantly
- Detects browser name and version
- Detects operating system and version (when available)
- Detects rendering engine (Blink, Gecko, WebKit, Trident, etc.)
- Detects device type (Desktop, Mobile, Tablet, Bot, Smart TV)
- Displays CPU architecture when advertised
- One-click "Use current browser" button to parse `navigator.userAgent`
- Copy parsed info as formatted text or JSON
- Clear/reset with a single click
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works completely offline

tools.name: UUID Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate random v4 UUIDs instantly, offline.
tools.longDescription:
## UUID Generator

A simple, offline tool to generate v4 UUIDs.

### Features

- Instant generation
- Multiple quantities (1, 5, 10, 50)
- Copy to clipboard
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Viewport / Screen Info
tools.shortDescription: Live browser, screen, and viewport details — resize or rotate to see them update in real time.
tools.longDescription:
## Viewport / Screen Info

Displays detailed information about the browser, screen, and viewport in real time, using standard browser APIs — no dev tools required.

### Features

- Viewport width/height and Visual Viewport dimensions
- Screen resolution and available screen size
- Device pixel ratio (DPR)
- Screen orientation (portrait/landscape)
- Color depth and pixel depth
- Outer window dimensions
- Touch support and max touch points
- Current URL, protocol, hostname, and user agent
- Live updates on resize, orientation change, and connectivity change
- Copy all device information to the clipboard
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: Visual Turing Machine
tools.shortDescription: A compiler and visual simulator engine for Turing Machine rules (State / Read / Write / Move / Next).
tools.longDescription:
## Visual Turing Machine

Simulator for Turing Machine rules.

tools.name: WebSocket & SSE Sandbox Client
tools.shortDescription: A developer client to connect to, inspect, send messages to, and debug WebSocket connections and Server-Sent Events (SSE) streams in real time.
tools.longDescription:
## WebSocket & SSE Sandbox Client

A developer client to connect to, inspect, send messages to, and debug WebSocket connections and Server-Sent Events (SSE) streams in real time entirely within the browser.

### Features

- **Flexible Endpoints**: Support for secure and insecure protocols (ws://, wss://, http://, https://).
- **Message Composer**: Build and send messages supporting raw text, formatted JSON, and customizable mock templates.
- **Timeline Stream Logger**: Search-filterable log showing incoming/outgoing events, server-sent events, errors, and connection states with timestamps.
- **Auto-Ping/Keepalive**: Custom ping intervals to keep connection alive, tracking latency and metrics.
- **Headers & Custom Protocols**: Custom headers configuration (utilizing a fetch-based stream reader for SSE) and subprotocol negotiation for WS handshakes.

tools.name: Word / Character Counter
tools.shortDescription: Real-time word, character, and sentence counter for text of any length.
tools.longDescription:
## Word / Character Counter

A minimalist, real-time text analysis tool. Type or paste text to instantly see word, character, and sentence counts — built for writers, marketers, and developers who need quick length checks without ad-heavy websites.

### Features

- Real-time character count (including spaces)
- Real-time word count
- Real-time sentence count
- Character count excluding spaces, line count, and estimated reading time
- Copy text or clear/reset with one click
- Clean, responsive, minimalist interface
- Fully functional offline with zero dependencies

tools.name: YAML / JSON Converter
tools.shortDescription: Convert between YAML and JSON in either direction, with validation and pretty-printed output.
tools.longDescription:
## YAML / JSON Converter

Convert data between YAML and JSON in both directions. Paste YAML or JSON, instantly see it converted to the other format, and get clear validation errors if the input doesn't parse.

### Features

- Convert YAML to JSON and JSON to YAML
- Live input/output preview with instant updates
- Syntax validation with clear error messages
- Pretty-printed output with configurable indentation (2/4 spaces or tab)
- Copy converted output to the clipboard, or use it as the next input
- Clear/reset with a single click
- Supports nested objects, arrays, strings, numbers, booleans, and null
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works offline once loaded
